understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' to win each level. The game progresses by finishing successive levels until overall victory.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a safe tile, hazard, or goal. Gravity is specified each turn. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') at the target position. Landing on spikes ('u'/'v') ends the run. Each level gives 2 attempts with a 50-turn budget. UNDO is available to revert mistakes.
